channel.title: Sports on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Sports on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: High Performance Campus (Loading...)
item.description: Train where you are. Picture where you going. The Caribbean High Performance Campus loads on the billboard while the actual training happens in a back lot with traffic cones, water bottles, and one tire.

item.title: Saturday's Guyana Brief: Toy Guns Guarding Your Groceries, Solar Power Rising, and Guyana Women Battle Jamaica Tonight!
item.description: Security guards caught with toy guns at supermarkets, US$8.14M solar farm lights up Charity, GBTI launches private banking for the rich, and Guyana Women seek redemption against Jamaica under the lights!
